title: Guatteria pubens

This family is part of the order Magnoliales, a group of flowering plants that have been around for millions of years. The order Magnoliales also includes other plant families such as the Schisandraceae and the Austrobaileyaceae. Guatteria pubens is a species within the genus Guatteria, which consists of tropical plants found in Central and South America. The classification of Guatteria pubens reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the Annonaceae family.
